validUser.description: Valid EY Admin user for creation tests

notes.fakerUsage: Use TestDataGenerator from src/tests/data/TestDataGenerator.ts for dynamic data
notes.usageExample: const user = TestDataGenerator.user(); const client = TestDataGenerator.client();
notes.emailRequirement: The API validates that emails exist in EY's identity system. For valid user creation tests, emails must exist in EY identity.
notes.fakerDocs: See @faker-js/faker documentation for all available generators
